<cmd>
ScanEnabled(true)
</cmd>

The command to enable scan mode is:

* ScanEnabled(true)

This command sets the scan mode to enabled, allowing the SPM tip to scan the sample.</s>

<cmd>
StageOffset_X_Tube_ADD(-12)
ScanEnabled(true)
</cmd>

The above command will shift the stage 12 nm to the left and start the scan with the current scan area.</s>

<cmd>
ScanEnabled(true)
</cmd>

The scan is now enabled.</s>

<cmd>
ApplyBias(-1)
ResetOrigin()
ScanArea(10, 10)
</cmd>

The user's command can be accomplished by the following steps:
1. Apply a bias of -1V to the sample.
2. Reset the origin of the scan.
3. Scan an area of 10x10.

The bias value is in Volts, and the scan area is in nanometers. The origin reset command resets the current position of the SPM tip to the origin (0,0). The scan area command sets the scan range in both the X and Y directions.</s>

ScanEnabled(true)
</cmd>
